message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceStyle arrowStyle blockArrowhead
skinparam actorBackgroundColor #e0e0ff
skinparam actorBorderColor #666666

title UML Sequence Diagram

participant "Client" as C1
participant "Service Provider" as SP
participant "Authorization Provider" as AP

C1 ..> AP : POST /register
AP <- 201 Created : C1

C1 ..> AP : POST /token
AP <- 200 OK : C1

@enduml
